intent: Write a 3-source brief on 'starter beekeeping, gardening, or indoor-plant accessories' for someone with a balcony and $100. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the home-kitchen and sports-outdoors categories and collect at least 4 products relevant to small-space gardening (pots, tools, soil, lighting). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/science for posts on beginner gardening mistakes, plant choice, or balcony constraints. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (3) Wikipedia — open 'Container garden' or 'Houseplant' articles and extract 3-4 facts on soil, light, water needs. The report must: (a) propose a $100 plan with storefront products, (b) back plant/tool choices with Wikipedia-grounded horticulture facts, (c) use community warnings to dodge common failures, (d) close with a first-month watering and light schedule. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Hard 3-site. Small-space gardening with horticulture grounding.
